title: Kanbus clock dark-mode face background pure black
description: Set React clock face background to true black in dark mode only; do not change light mode. Validate on-device by restarting kanbus_clock.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implemented: dark-mode React runtime clock face color changed to pure black (#000000) in storybook-app/src/runtime/main.tsx. Rebuilt dist-pixoo-runtime and restarted kanbus_clock in dark mode for live validation.
